mapper.sql:
o.customer_uuid = #{q.customerUuid} AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5) AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) > 0 AND f.warehouse_uuid = #{q.warehouseUuid}
AND f.uuid IN
#{finishUuid}
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0 ) AND f.is_remain = 1 AND COALESCE(f.is_remain, 0) != 1
AND (f.finish_roll_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(f.gram_weight AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(f.finish_width AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR f.original_roll_nos LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_finish_original_rel fr INNER JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = fr.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE fr.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND fr.is_deleted = 0 AND (r.roll_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR r.extra_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%')) ))
AND COALESCE(f.source_type, 1) != 2 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_finish_original_rel fr WHERE fr.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND fr.is_deleted = 0 )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_finish_original_rel fr INNER JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = fr.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE fr.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND fr.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(r.roll_no, '') = '' AND COALESCE(r.extra_no, '') = '' )

sql.if: AND (f.finish_roll_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(f.gram_weight AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(f.finish_width AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR f.original_roll_nos LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_finish_original_rel fr INNER JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = fr.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE fr.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND fr.is_deleted = 0 AND (r.roll_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR r.extra_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%')) ))
AND COALESCE(f.source_type, 1) != 2 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_finish_original_rel fr WHERE fr.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND fr.is_deleted = 0 )

AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_finish_original_rel fr INNER JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = fr.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE fr.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND fr.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(r.roll_no, '') = '' AND COALESCE(r.extra_no, '') = '' )

mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) > 0 AND f.warehouse_uuid = #{q.warehouseUuid} AND COALESCE(f.is_remain, 0) != 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS productCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) > 0 AND f.warehouse_uuid = #{q.warehouseUuid} AND f.is_remain = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS remainCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) > 0 AND f.warehouse_uuid IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0)
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unassignedWarehouseCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) > 0 AND f.warehouse_uuid IS NOT NULL AND f.warehouse_uuid != #{q.warehouseUuid} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0)
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS otherWarehouseCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) > 0 AND f.warehouse_uuid = #{q.warehouseUuid} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0)
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS lockedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) <= 0 AND f.warehouse_uuid = #{q.warehouseUuid}
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS invalidWeightCount FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid WHERE o.customer_uuid = #{q.customerUuid} AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5) AND f.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid WHERE

SELECT f.uuid AS finishUuid, f.finish_roll_no AS finishRollNo, o.uuid AS orderUuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_date AS orderDate, f.warehouse_uuid AS warehouseUuid, w.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, w.location AS warehouseLocation, f.stock_in_time AS stockInTime, f.paper_name AS paperName, f.gram_weight AS gramWeight, f.finish_width AS finishWidth, f.finish_diameter AS finishDiameter, f.finish_core_diameter AS finishCoreDiameter, f.actual_weight AS actualWeight, COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) AS remainingWeight, f.is_remain AS isRemain, f.source_type AS sourceType, f.finish_status AS finishStatus, f.original_roll_nos AS originalRollNos, o.settle_type AS settleType, o.settle_day AS settleDay, o.is_invoice AS isInvoice FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid LEFT JOIN sys_warehouse w ON w.uuid = f.warehouse_uuid AND w.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY o.order_date ASC, o.order_no ASC, f.row_sort ASC, f.uuid ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
